en: Is there a reason you stopped reading Belsham? I'm sorry.
ko: Belsham 읽는 걸 멈춘 이유가 있어?

en: I'll continue. You mind yourself, dearie.
Someday you'll need me, and you'll wish you had behaved better.
ko: 언젠가 너는 나를 필요로 할 거고, 그때 너는 더 잘했으면 좋았을 거라고 생각할 거야.

en: Thank you, Aunt March, for your employment and your many kindnesses.
ko: 고마워, Aunt March. 일자리랑 많은 친절에 감사해.

en: But I intend to make my own way in the world.
ko: 하지만 나는 내 길을 스스로 개척할 거야.

en: Oh, well, no, no one makes their own way.
ko: 아, 아니야, 누구도 자기 길을 스스로 개척하지 않아.

en: Not really. Least of all a woman.
You'll need to marry well. You are not married, Aunt March.
ko: 잘 결혼해야 해. 너는 결혼 안 했잖아, Aunt March.
